key_features: Comprehensive auth operations: registration, login, logout, token refresh
Password reset and email verification flows
Security features: email enumeration prevention, account suspension checks, failed login tracking
patterns_used: Service layer pattern with business logic separation

patterns_discovered.description: Uses tsyringe @injectable and @inject decorators for IoC container management
Validates all inputs against zod schemas before processing
patterns_discovered.impact: Ensures data integrity and prevents invalid operations

patterns_discovered.description: Emits custom events for auth operations (registration, login, logout, password reset)
patterns_discovered.impact: Enables audit logging and integration with other services

patterns_discovered.description: Implements email enumeration prevention, account suspension checks, and failed login event tracking
Uses private methods like buildTokenUser, buildAuthenticatedUser, findUserWithRoles for code reusability
patterns_discovered.impact: Reduces code duplication and improves maintainability

patterns_discovered.description: Tracks request context (IP address, user agent) for security monitoring
patterns_discovered.impact: Enables forensic analysis and suspicious activity detection

gotchas_discovered.description: forgotPassword and resendVerification always return success messages even when email doesn't exist
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Design prevents attackers from discovering registered email addresses

gotchas_discovered.description: Single session logout (logout with allDevices: false) is not fully implemented; note suggests need for full token payload
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Comment in code acknowledges limitation; may need refactoring to pass complete token data

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: TODO: Email notification service integration missing
gotchas_discovered.description: Verification email sending is stubbed out and awaits notification service implementation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Must implement notification service integration before production deployment

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses notDeleted filter consistently but must ensure database soft delete strategy is properly maintained
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure all user queries apply notDeleted filter to avoid returning deleted accounts

gotchas_discovered.description: Login allows unverified users with a flag; no enforced email verification gate
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Business logic allows flexibility but may need stricter enforcement based on requirements

approach_outcome.summary: Comprehensive auth service successfully implemented with all core functionality
accomplishments: User registration with email verification workflow
Login with credential validation and role/permission extraction
Token refresh mechanism with user re-validation
Logout with single-session and all-devices support
Complete password reset flow with token validation
Email verification flow with resend capability
Session tracking with multiple device support
Comprehensive error handling and security checks
Event emission for audit logging on all major operations
architectural_decisions: Separated business logic service from core auth service for clean separation of concerns
Used dependency injection for all external dependencies (Prisma, AuthService, EventService)
Implemented comprehensive input validation using zod schemas
Built security-first approach with email enumeration prevention and audit logging
Tracked request context for forensic analysis capability

recommendations.recommendation: Integrate notification service to send verification and password reset emails
recommendations.rationale: Currently stubbed out with TODO comments; essential for complete auth flow

recommendations.recommendation: Complete single-session logout implementation with full token payload handling
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation noted as incomplete; needs refactoring to properly revoke individual tokens

recommendations.recommendation: Add rate limiting to registration, login, and password reset endpoints
recommendations.rationale: Protects against brute force and DOS attacks on auth endpoints

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive unit and integration tests for all auth flows
recommendations.rationale: Large service with 910 LOC and complex logic requires thorough test coverage

recommendations.recommendation: Add password complexity requirements validation beyond schema
recommendations.rationale: Currently only schema validation; may need additional rules (entropy, character types)

recommendations.recommendation: Implement account lockout after repeated failed login attempts
recommendations.rationale: Currently logs events but doesn't enforce lockout; adds brute force protection

recommendations.recommendation: Add JSDoc examples for error scenarios and exception handling
recommendations.rationale: Current docs show happy path; developers need to understand error cases

recommendations.recommendation: Add structured logging alongside event emission for production debugging
recommendations.rationale: Events are good for audit but logs aid operational debugging
